emails.subject: Re: CRC Deal #474382
emails.body: Re: CRC Deal #474382 Yes, Mike would like special language included in this deal's confirm letter. I spoke with him and a couple of the other traders, who said that they were aware of the change coming in April-02, but weren't aware they needed to enter comments in the deal. I'm sending an e-mail out to all of them to remind everyone to enter comments in deals that go past April-02 if they want special language. Please let me know if there's anything else I can do. Thanks, Kate Kimberly Hundl@ENRON 12/06/2000 07:13 AM

emails.subject: CRC Deal #474382
emails.body: CRC Deal #474382 This deal with Colorado River Commission is for calendar 2002. We were told that we may need to enter special CAISO language for deals that extent past April 2002, but that the traders should be entering comments to indicate this. Does Mike want us to include this language in the confirm letter for this deal? Thanks for your help! Kim
